hook: Good physical pacing makes interest easier to trust because it stays connected to comfort and responsiveness.
body: Attraction grows better when the physical side of the interaction feels mutual, readable, and unforced.

hook: Some men think moving faster proves confidence when it often just proves that they are prioritizing their own uncertainty relief.
body: Confidence here means reading, calibrating, and letting mutuality lead.

hook: Confidence here means reading, calibrating, and letting mutuality lead.
body: A moment that is warm, reciprocal, and easy to stay inside is usually stronger than a move that creates visible tension or hesitation.

body: Let the physical pace match the actual comfort and participation in the room, not the timeline in your head.
